disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Almost no solid food intake for several weeks
trigger_question_examples: How has her eating been lately?
When did she last eat a proper meal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's barely eaten anything for weeks now — she just picks at things and pushes the plate away because it hurts to chew and food doesn't taste of anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New bilateral lower-leg swelling developing over three days
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the swelling in her legs.
When did the swelling start and is it both legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both her legs have puffed right up over the last three days — up to about the middle of her calves — and the skin looks tight and shiny.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute inability to mobilise today in someone normally independent with a stick
trigger_question_examples: Is she able to get up and move around?
What can she do for herself today compared with normal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Normally she shuffles around with her stick, but today she just can't get out of bed at all — she's got no strength.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ill-fitting dentures causing gum pain and preventing chewing (reversible mechanical barrier to eating)
trigger_question_examples: Is there any reason eating is hard for her — pain, teeth, swallowing?
How are her teeth or dentures?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her top dentures don't fit any more and her gums are really sore and inflamed, so it hurts too much to chew.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies chest pain, can lie flat without breathlessness, denies waking at night short of breath
trigger_question_examples: Does she get short of breath, especially lying down or at night?
Any chest pain or trouble breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, she doesn't get chest pain and she sleeps lying flat without any trouble breathing — she doesn't wake up gasping.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think it's her breathing, it's really the swelling and how weak she's got.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant unintentional weight loss over recent months
trigger_question_examples: Do her clothes or rings fit differently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's lost a lot of weight over the last several months — her clothes just hang off her now.

trigger_question_examples: Any cuts or sores that are slow to heal?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's got a couple of little skin tears on her arms that just don't seem to be healing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Social isolation and inability to obtain or prepare food; near-empty fridge
trigger_question_examples: Who helps her at home, and how does she manage shopping and meals?
Is there food in the house?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's on her own and I'm the only one who checks on her. Her fridge is nearly empty — just some off food — she can't get out to shop or cook any more.

trigger_question_examples: How is her energy and strength?
Is she able to do things for herself like usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She says she's got no energy at all — she can't even lift a spoon to feed herself.
